name: Sheshananda Reddy Kandula
bio: Pavan Reddy is a Principal Software Engineer at Automata, developing the core product and leading efforts toward FIPS, FedRAMP ATO, and AI initiatives in vulnerability and compliance management. He is an AI security researcher and the founder of QBTrain, a free platform for AI and AI Security education. His work focuses on adversarial attacks, prompt injection vulnerabilities, and systemic weaknesses in AI foundation models. He has presented at HCI International and FLAIRS, taught workshops at BSides, SquadCon, and ACM SIGCITE, delivered 15+ talks/workshops, and reaches 80,000+ online followers.
